title: UNIX Password File (passwd) Structure and Access Flow
description: A flowchart showing the structure of the /etc/passwd file, the entities involved in accessing it, and the security context of the setuid mechanism used by the passwd command.
relationships: User runs the passwd command, which has the setuid bit set and is owned by root
The passwd process runs with root privileges, allowing it to read/write the protected /etc/shadow file
The process reads the /etc/passwd file for user account information
After successful authentication, the process updates the user's encrypted password in the /etc/shadow file
